claim: Core blocks render chars_current/chars_limit inline; LLM self-edits (core_memory_replace) near limit, choosing what to evict/summarize, vs a blind hard cap.
On summarization failure descends self_compact_all -> self_compact_sliding_window -> all, + post-compaction token verification with re-compaction if still over threshold.
maps_to: stage4-filter.ts + recall assembly (today single-pass, no recovery)

claim: Keep a configurable sliding_window_percentage of the window after summarization; clip summary via clip_chars (50000) — a tunable ratio vs fixed per-tier caps.
Archival/recall sizes injected into system prompt (external_memory_summary) so the model knows external availability without spending content tokens.
maps_to: search-decision-envelope.ts + progressive-disclosure.ts (counts exist API-level, not as prompt tokens)

claim: Fast bytes/4 x 1.3-margin token estimate for compaction threshold checks, avoiding tokenizer loads.
